name: Sitra Holdings (International) Limited
summary: Sitra Holdings (International) Limited, an investment holding company, distributes wood-based products and lifestyle outdoor furniture under the Comcia, decKING, and Pacific brands. Its wood-based products include decks, decking systems, flooring, fences, and other DIY products; and lifestyle furniture products comprise outdoor garden furniture, garden accessories, and contract furnishings. The company also manufactures, supplies, and distributes wood-based and other related products, as well as develops properties. It has operations in Australia, New Zealand, Europe, and Asia. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Singapore.
